compiled_state.title: Write RED behavioral tests for ticket_reducer/marker.py API (write_marker, remove_marker, check_marker)
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## What
Create tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py with failing behavioral tests for the marker module API that will be implemented in the next task. All tests must FAIL before implementation.

## Tests to write (Given/When/Then)

1. test_write_marker_creates_file: Given a temp ticket dir with no .archived file, When write_marker(ticket_dir) is called, Then <ticket_dir>/.archived file exists on disk.

2. test_check_marker_true_after_write: Given a temp ticket dir where write_marker was called, When check_marker(ticket_dir) is called, Then it returns True.

3. test_check_marker_false_without_marker: Given a temp ticket dir with no .archived file, When check_marker(ticket_dir) is called, Then it returns False.

4. test_remove_marker_deletes_file: Given a temp ticket dir with a .archived file, When remove_marker(ticket_dir) is called, Then the .archived file no longer exists.

5. test_remove_marker_idempotent: Given a temp ticket dir with no .archived file, When remove_marker(ticket_dir) is called, Then no error is raised and the dir state is unchanged.

6. test_write_marker_error_tolerance: Given write_marker is called on a ticket_dir where .archived cannot be created (e.g., dir is a non-existent path), When write_marker is called, Then no exception is raised (the function logs to stderr and returns gracefully).

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py (CREATE)
- .test-index (add entry: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/marker.py: tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py)

## .test-index update (REQUIRED)
Add to .test-index (fuzzy match: 'ticketreducermarkerpy' is NOT a substring of any existing test name — explicit entry required):
plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/marker.py: tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh exits non-zero (tests are RED before implementation)
  Verify: python3 -m pytest tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py; test $? -ne 0
- [ ] test file exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py
- [ ] test file contains at least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "def test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry added for marker.py
  Verify: grep -q "ticket_reducer/marker.py" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] .test-index RED marker added: [test_write_marker_creates_file]
  Verify: grep -q "\[test_write_marker_creates_file\]" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
- [ ] ruff check passes on new test file
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test_ticket_reducer_marker.py

comments.body: SC8 import validation: T1 RED tests must include test_marker_imports_from_package() verifying that write_marker, remove_marker, check_marker are importable from ticket_reducer package (from ticket_reducer import write_marker, remove_marker, check_marker). This covers SC8 without a separate task.
comments.author: Test
